raw_transcript: We'll look for longitudinal furrows, rings, or white exudates. Most importantly, we'll take biopsies. If we see more than 15 eosinophils per high-power field under the microscope, the diagnosis is confirmed.
final_corrected_note: We'll look for longitudinal furrows, rings, or white exudates. Most importantly, we'll take biopsies. If we see more than 15 eosinophils per high-power field under the microscope, the diagnosis is confirmed.
